direction.description: High-energy, hyper-kinetic typographic style blending crisp, modernist digital text with fluid, imperfect hand-drawn marker overlays. Built for aggressive audio-visual synchronization.

background.behavior: Canvas background snaps inverted (white to black / black to white) immediately to punctuate macro beat shifts in the narrative.

functional_accents.label_backgrounds: Transparent with sketchy fill #00F553 applied selectively underneath specific typography syllables
functional_accents.linguistic_grouping: #00F553 (Acid Green used strictly for user emphasis, positive environmental markers, or call-to-actions)

colors.color_scheme_type: Binary with single maximalist neon highlight.
colors.contrast_level: Extremes only. Avoid all mid-tones unless representing photographic/video materials.

animation_style.technique: Directional Kinetic Typography combined with Stop-Motion / Cel-Animation Emulation for doodle overlays. Text always enters from a direction — it is never static or instantly placed.
animation_style.easing_type: Fast directional slide into a hard rest. Text travels a very short distance from its entry direction, decelerates sharply, and snaps to its final position. Zero bounce, zero overshoot after the snap.
animation_style.easing_description: Every text element originates from a direction (left, right, bottom, or following the reading flow) and completes a brief, fast slide before locking into its resting position. The movement is always intentional and directional — it communicates where the word is coming from. Once rested, the element is completely frozen. No lingering motion, no bounce, no elastic behavior. Doodle assets use zero easing, animating frame-by-frame at a lowered frame rate (12-15fps) to emulate hand-drawn cel animation.

entrance_modes.word_by_word_directional: Used for high-importance narration words. Each word slides in individually from its entry direction, locks to rest, then the next word follows — all mapped exactly to the spoken audio syllable-by-syllable.
entrance_modes.phrase_group_directional: Used for lower-emphasis or supporting text. A partial sentence or group of words slides in together as a single unit from one direction, settling into position as a block.

animation_style.movement_quality: Percussive, unpolished, punchy. Extremely deliberate lack of 'slickness' to favor rawness.
animation_style.word_chaining: Audio-Reactive Typewriter Spacing. Words chain left-to-right one at a time, each sliding in from its entry direction and locking to rest on the narrator's spoken syllable.

transitions.whip_pan: When the canvas needs to transition between layouts, it whip-pans violently to the next frame — not a smooth float.
transitions.brutalist_media_cut: Hard single-frame slam cuts between stark 2D black-and-white graphics and hyper-detailed macro live-action b-roll footage.

timing.flow: Relative matching duration to VO pacing — words slide in and lock left-to-right to match exact speaker rhythm and pauses.
timing.morph: Audio-Responsive Cut: Assets transition precisely on plosive consonants (P, T, K).

code.description: High-energy, hyper-kinetic typographic style blending crisp, modernist digital text with fluid, imperfect hand-drawn marker overlays. Built for aggressive audio-visual synchronization.

background.behavior: Canvas background snaps inverted (white to black / black to white) immediately to punctuate macro beat shifts in the narrative.

functional_accents.label_backgrounds: Transparent with sketchy fill #00F553 applied selectively underneath specific typography syllables
functional_accents.linguistic_grouping: #00F553 (Acid Green used strictly for user emphasis, positive environmental markers, or call-to-actions)

colors.color_scheme_type: Binary with single maximalist neon highlight.
colors.contrast_level: Extremes only. Avoid all mid-tones unless representing photographic/video materials.

text_formatting.font: Clean, modernist geometric sans-serif. Heavy/Bold weight exclusively throughout.
text_formatting.tracking: Extremely tight letter spacing. Words feel solid and block-like, letters nearly touching.

case_rules.standard_text: Sentence case ('To make every...') or entirely lowercase for stark minimalism ('apple.com', 'plastic', 'carbon neutral').
case_rules.marker_annotation_text: Exclusively UPPERCASE for all sketchy, handwritten-style overlay text (e.g., 'AND A PROMISE', 'ALREADY', 'STILL').

text_formatting.color_rules: Highly restricted. True black text on light gray/white background, or pure white text on black background. Bright acid green (#00F553) strictly reserved for marker sketches, specific emphasis URLs, or words receiving massive spoken emphasis.
text_formatting.inline_symbols: The physical Apple logo symbol is embedded directly into the text flow to phonetically represent the word 'Apple' (e.g., 'To make  carbon neutral').

positioning.default: Narration text is center-anchored or left-anchored relative to the reading flow. Not randomly placed.
positioning.rule: Text positioning is always intentional and directional — anchored to the nearest active graphic or the spoken word's visual weight. Dead-center single-word isolation is common for high-emphasis words. Multi-word chains build left-to-right from an anchor point.
positioning.forbidden: Do not randomly scatter text. Do not center every element by default. Positioning must always serve the audio rhythm and visual hierarchy.

hierarchy.primary_label: Proportional: Mega-Scale (Text breaks frame margins to function as texture)
hierarchy.sub_data: Proportional: Body Size (Snug to the mega-text with sketchy arrow connectors)
hierarchy.header: Stark contrast, size dictating spoken-word audio emphasis volume.

shapes.primary_forms: Text is the primary form. Typography functions as both the content and the visual structure of every scene.
shapes.edge_quality: High contrast vectors but animated at a lower frame-rate (12-15fps step-timing) to feel 'chunky' and hand-sketched.
shapes.dimensionality: Strictly 2D flat layer structure (Typography layer -> Doodle overlay layer -> Live-action base layer)
shapes.complexity_level: Minimalist juxtaposition. Absolute sterile type against raw, sketchy icons.

lines_and_arrows.line_style: Clean, confident hand-drawn marker strokes. Mostly straight. No wobble, no irregular flow. The hand-drawn quality comes from weight variation and draw-on animation, not from distortion or jitter.
lines_and_arrows.underlines: Used very sparingly — only under specific words or phrases that require critical viewer attention. A single clean, mostly straight stroke. Not a decorative pattern. Must not appear frequently throughout the video.
lines_and_arrows.arrow_tips: Asymmetric, quickly drawn heads (e.g., one stroke longer than the other).
lines_and_arrows.thickness: Proportional: thick stroke (2-3% of viewport height). Should rival the stem weight of the bold text.
lines_and_arrows.curved_connectors: Used selectively to weave through tight clusters of text, linking isolated concepts across the screen.

animation_style.technique: Directional Kinetic Typography combined with Stop-Motion / Cel-Animation Emulation for doodle overlays. Text always enters from a direction — it is never static or instantly placed.
animation_style.easing_type: Fast directional slide into a hard rest. Text travels a very short distance from its entry direction, decelerates sharply, and snaps to its final position. Zero bounce, zero overshoot after the snap.
animation_style.easing_description: Every text element originates from a direction (left, right, bottom, or following the reading flow) and completes a brief, fast slide before locking into its resting position. The movement is always intentional and directional — it communicates where the word is coming from. Once rested, the element is completely frozen. No lingering motion, no bounce, no elastic behavior. Doodle assets use zero easing, animating frame-by-frame at a lowered frame rate (12-15fps) to emulate hand-drawn cel animation.

entrance_modes.phrase_group_directional: Used for lower-emphasis or supporting text. A partial sentence or group of words slides in together as a single unit from one direction, settling into position as a block.

animation_style.movement_quality: Percussive, unpolished, punchy. Extremely deliberate lack of 'slickness' to favor rawness.
animation_style.word_chaining: Audio-Reactive Typewriter Spacing. Words chain left-to-right one at a time, each sliding in from its entry direction and locking to rest on the narrator's spoken syllable.

transitions.brutalist_media_cut: Hard single-frame slam cuts between stark 2D black-and-white graphics and hyper-detailed macro live-action b-roll footage.

timing.morph: Audio-Responsive Cut: Assets transition precisely on plosive consonants (P, T, K).

asset.instructions: Hyper-kinetic typographic aesthetic. Frame is dominated by stark, sterile, heavy-weight text. Secondary visual elements must act as punctuation to the text, taking the form of crude, fluid marker-style doodles. Absolute high contrast. The canvas physically scrolls or completely inverts colors (white-to-black/black-to-white) dynamically as it runs out of space.

gradients.notes: Absolutely no gradients on data, text, or vector layers. Visual punch relies entirely on flat, unbroken blocks of stark contrasting color.

stroke.color: highlight neon (#00F553) or stark background inverse
stroke.notes: Strokes must look organically hand-drawn. Allow minor path irregularities, slightly overlapping path closures, and minor stroke tapering to simulate a human lifting a wet marker.

shading.notes: Strict 2D execution. No shadows, highlights, or 3D extrusions on text or doodles. The visual friction comes from the pairing of perfectly flat computer text with imperfect 2D sketches.

complexity.notes: Assets must be distilled to one-liner sketches, thick underlines, rough arrows, or filled blobs. Do not draw intricate details; rely entirely on scaling motion and bold layout positioning for visual interest.

filters.notes: Apply a very subtle, localized `feTurbulence` mapping strictly to the vector strokes of the 'doodle' elements to simulate ink bleeding or marker texture. Exclude typography from all filters so the text remains ruthlessly clean.
